meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Ship SaaS Faster (Expert Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your workflow, ship faster, and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from decision fatigue and architecture bloat. By utilizing an Antigravity project template, you standardize your boilerplate, enforce modularity, and offload repetitive coding tasks to Claude Code. This shifts your focus from syntax struggles to high-value feature delivery, ensuring you ship production-ready code every single sprint.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial rush of a new project, the clean IDE, the ambitious roadmap. Then, reality strikes. Scope creep sets in, dependencies conflict, and your momentum evaporates into a graveyard of half-finished repos. You are burning billable hours on plumbing instead of product.

It is time to stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard scaffold designed to eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome. By pairing this architectural rigor with the autonomous speed of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling coder into an unstoppable production machine.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Initialize your project with the Antigravity core to enforce strict directory structure and shared state management from minute zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard boilerplate. Include authentication modules, database schema scaffolding, and a pre-configured API routing layer.

steps.title: Define Domain Models via Schema
steps.description: Use the template's schema generator to define your database entities, ensuring type safety across the entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma models for a multi-tenant SaaS application. Include User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relationship definitions.

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD boilerplate. Use Claude Code to map your schema to API endpoints automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for all models defined in the schema. Ensure Zod validation is implemented for every request body.

steps.title: Integrate Global State Logic
steps.description: Inject the Antigravity state handler to manage complex client-side data flows without prop-drilling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the global state manager using the Antigravity pattern. Implement persistence for user preferences and session data.

steps.title: Final Production Audit
steps.description: Run a final sweep to ensure all security headers, environment variables, and deployment hooks are correctly configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the codebase. Identify missing environment variables and suggest optimizations for production build speed.

pro_tips: Always run your Claude Code prompts in 'stream' mode to catch architectural mistakes before the file is fully written.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' to generate unit tests alongside your code logic to ensure 100% coverage from day one.
Map your client's specific business logic as a custom 'plugin' within the template to make future updates a single-command process.
Configure a local 'context-store' file so Claude Code remembers your architectural preferences across multiple project sessions.
Leverage the Antigravity CLI to prune unused dependencies during the build phase; leaner bundles mean faster deployment times and happier clients.
content.next_steps: Once the boilerplate is live, deploy your MVP to a staging environment using Vercel or Railway. Use the feedback loop to iterate on features, and use Claude Code to refactor based on real user data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the 'almost finished' phase. Harness the power of standardized architecture and AI-driven development to deliver value faster than your competitors. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
